TRANSLATION.TEXT: Location {0}. It should be the party from before.
10-4. I will take care about this.
Talk to the caller by pressing {0} to gain information.
Step into the marker and press {0} to ring the doorbell.
No one has heard the doorbell. Check the backyard of this property!
Go to the backyard and step into the marker. Press {0} to talk.
Arrest the owner and turn off the music by steping into the marker and press {0}.
